measurement_note: Size is R, the number of Employees rows, with every salary appearing exactly twice. Grouping counts each salary once and ranking the eligible rows takes O(R log R) general-plan time. A correct correlated count that rescans Employees for every row completes all tiers and fails only by O(R^2) scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: group 64 employees into 32 salary teams
benchmark: group 256 employees into 128 salary teams
benchmark: group 1024 employees into 512 salary teams
